zh.Storeton, Cheshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭爾斯托雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Letitia Venables於1230年出生在英國爾文哈姆時，她的父親William De VENABLES30歲，母親Mrs. William De Venables27歲。她於大約1245年與Richard De Wilburgham在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1288年之後。

zh-hans.Storeton, Cheshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰爾斯托雷頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Letitia Venables于1230年出生在英国爾文哈姆时，她的父亲William De VENABLES30岁，母亲Mrs. William De Venables27岁。她于大约1245年与Richard De Wilburgham在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1288年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Letitia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   Laetitia  , which has recently enjoyed a rise in popularity in Britain, notably among West Indians.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Letitia Venables was born in 1230, in Wincham, Cheshire, England, her father, William De VENABLES, was 30 and her mother, Mrs. William De Venables, was 27. She married Richard De Wilburgham about 1245, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 1288.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Letitia Venables est née en 1230, à Wincham, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William De VENABLES, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William De Venables, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Richard De Wilburgham environ 1245, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1288.

de.lifeSummary: Als Letitia Venables 1230 in Wincham, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William De VENABLES 30 und ihre Mutter Mrs. William De Venables 27. Sie hat um 1245 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Richard De Wilburgham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1288.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Letitia Venables è nata il nel 1230 nel Wincham, Cheshire, England, sua padre, William De VENABLES, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Mrs. William De Venables, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Richard De Wilburgham circa 1245, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1288.

ja.lifeSummary: Letitia Venablesが1230年にイギリスチェシュアイアウィンチャムで生まれた時，父William De VENABLESは30歳，母Mrs. William De Venablesは27歳であった。約1245年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでRichard De Wilburghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1288年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Letitia Venables(이)가 1230년 영국 체실르 윈챔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William De VENABLES(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. William De Venables(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Richard De Wilburgham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1288년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Letitia Venables nasceu em 1230, em Wincham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De VENABLES, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William De Venables, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard De Wilburgham aproximadamente 1245, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1288.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Letitia Venables родилась в 1230 г. в местности винчам, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William De VENABLES было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William De Venables, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard De Wilburgham около 1245 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1288 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Letitia Venables nació en 1230, en Wincham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William De VENABLES, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mrs. William De Venables, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Richard De Wilburgham aproximadamente 1245, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 1288.
